rationale: The two papers are tightly aligned on identifying social contagion/installed-base effects under correlated unobservables: the citing paper’s stated gap targets prior social-effects studies using rich controls, and the cited paper is a recent empirical contagion study explicitly focused on identification confounds. Given this methodological and construct overlap (contagion, local influence, confound control), the citation is plausibly substantive (theory/method/comparison) rather than an obvious incidental mention.
